summary: Set 028 (3 of 3 FINAL): Drift-class hotfixes + harness hardening completed. Session 1: fixed fresh-set completedSessions[] schema omission (ai_router 0.3.1→0.3.2), added explicit test coverage. Session 2: refactored Electron environment from blocklist to allowlist approach in electronLaunch.ts, future-proofing against IDE host pollution (extension 0.13.16→0.13.17). Session 3: added GitHub Actions CI matrix (.github/workflows/test.yml) running pytest + Playwright on ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest; xvfb-run on Linux for headless GUI rendering. Layer 2 (@vscode/test-electron) intentionally skipped — known broken on Windows 11 + VS Code 1.120. All 40 pytest + 5 Playwright tests pass locally. Estimated cost: ~$0.40 (routing negligible; no cross-provider verification needed). Set closes with 3/3 sessions complete.

reason.specifics: Set 028 closes with all 3 sessions and all 3 follow-up items from Set 027 cross-provider review now addressed: fresh-set completedSessions[] schema fixed, Electron env allowlist refactored, CI matrix deployed. No follow-up orchestration needed; operator can cut release tags per standard workflow. Force-closed mid-set downgrade remains as future candidate (Set 029+) pending architectural decision.
